director.name: Shem Oyugi
director.title: School Director
director.message:
Dear Parents and Guardians,

It is my honor to welcome you to Shinners Precious School. We are committed to providing quality CBC education that nurtures every child's potential. Our dedicated teachers ensure that each learner receives personal attention and support.

We invite you to visit our school and experience the Shinners difference.
director.signature:
Yours in education,

Shem Oyugi
Director, Shinners Precious School

footer_text: Shinners Precious School. All rights reserved.

mission_vision.mission: To provide high quality education and childcare in a safe, respectful and inclusive environment that builds a foundation for lifelong learning.
mission_vision.vision: To be a center of excellence that produces lifelong learners and critical thinkers equipped for global success.
